item.title: MIUI OS3.0.4.0.WOPMIXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 14 Pro+ 5G Global
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Note 14 Pro+ 5G Global

Codename: amethyst

Version: OS3.0.4.0.WOPMIXM | 16.0

Size: 9.4 GB

MD5: b73684119f42a6fc20c3d3eece08dd86

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to January 2026. Increased system security.
